parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO journey_entries (project, type, source, summary, notable, social_score, tags, metadata)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.project }}',
  '{{ $json.type }}',
  'pr_hook',
  '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  false,
  0,
  ARRAY['pr']::text[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ branch: $json.branch, action: $json.action, pr_number: $json.pr_number, merged: $json.merged }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
